hero.card1_desc: Our agency connects you with extraordinary web experiences. Start your journey to discovering the perfect digital match for your activity.
hero.card2_desc: Security, Scalability, SEO are the three words that defines our priorities. We are aware of all the news and hack possibilities to provide you the best product for your need.

seo.title: Referencing (SEO)
seo.desc: A beautiful website is useless if no one can find it. We build SEO directly into the architecture of your site, ensuring maximum visibility and organic growth.

f1.title: Global Visibility
f1.desc: We ensure your site ranks high on global search engines, attracting worldwide traffic.

f2.title: Keyword Optimization
f2.desc: Deep analysis and integration of keywords that matter to your business.

f3.title: Traffic Growth
f3.desc: Sustainable organic traffic growth with proven, white-hat SEO strategies.

process.title: Our Methodology
process.subtitle: From the initial idea to production release, we design robust architectures, inspiring mockups, and secure deployment pipelines.

step1.title: 1. Architecture Conception
step1.desc: Before writing a single line of code, we design the technical architecture of your project. We select the right databases, APIs, and cloud infrastructure to ensure optimal scalability, security, and performance.

step2.title: 2. Mockups & Moodboards
step2.desc: Visual identity is paramount. We create inspiring moodboards and high-fidelity mockups that we present to you. We iterate together until the design perfectly reflects your brand's DNA.

step3.title: 3. Validation & Development
step3.desc: Once the mockup is validated, our development team takes over. We set up strict pipelines to ensure code quality, automated tests, and continuous deployment.

portfolio.title: Our Work
portfolio.subtitle: Discover some of the extraordinary web experiences we've built. Modern architectures, fast deployments, and pixel-perfect design.

contact.title: Ready to begin?
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss how we can bring your vision to life. Fill out the form below and we will get back to you within 24 hours.

cgv.title: General Terms of Sales (CGV)
cgv.s1_desc: These General Terms of Sales govern the contractual relationship between Rémi Puigsech, Sole Proprietorship (SIREN: 990551582) located in CAMPAGNE, and any professional or individual client wishing to benefit from web creation, SEO, and deployment services.
cgv.s2_desc: Rémi Puigsech offers custom web development services. The details of each service are defined in a quote previously accepted by the client.
cgv.s3_desc: Prices are indicated in euros. According to the applicable tax regime, VAT may or may not apply. Payment is made according to the terms defined on the quote (usually 30 days invoice date).
cgv.s4_desc: Delivery times are given as an indication. Any delay shall not justify order cancellation or give rise to penalties, unless expressly stipulated otherwise.
cgv.s5_desc: In case of dispute, an amicable solution will be sought before any legal action. Failing this, the competent courts will be those of Rémi Puigsech's headquarters.

conf.title: Privacy Policy
conf.s1_desc: When using our contact forms, we collect the following data: Last Name, First Name, and Email Address. This data is used exclusively to respond to your service or partnership requests.
conf.s2_desc: The processing of this data is carried out by Rémi Puigsech (EI). It is kept for a maximum of 3 years after our last contact. As the site is hosted by Vercel, some technical data (IP addresses) may be collected for security purposes.
conf.s3_desc: In accordance with GDPR regulations, you have a right of access, rectification, erasure, and portability of your data. To exercise this right, you can contact us at: contact@remipuigsech.fr.
conf.s4_desc: Our site only uses technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning. No advertising tracking cookie is deposited without your prior consent.
